holdings.infoBox: SPYA is an equity ETF with a total of 15 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Twin Oak Endure ETF (SPYA) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund seeks to provide total return by actively investing in US equity securities of all market capitalizations while implementing a hedging strategy that utilizes options, swaps, and other derivatives. SPYA was launched on Jun 2, 2025 and is issued by Twin Oak.
